title: Plan metadata block
description: Validates the JSON inside the `<!-- factory-meta: {...} -->` HTML comment at the top of plan.md. The rest of plan.md is markdown (headers + checkboxes), specified in plan-format.md.

lock_status.description: "draft" = plan being assembled by bootstrap-agent. "active" = factory may edit it. "locked" = no further edits without explicit unlock (set after Phase 2c per ADR-0008).
